traceability_name: M11 Public Integration Pack Pilot Release Proof Linkage
aaos_retained_authority_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, release authority, and final governance authority.
decision_proof_sealing_boundary_preserva: Decision Proof sealing remains AAOS-owned. Public integration packs, external evidence consumers, registries, release proof linkage, runtime replay, deterministic evaluators, and CI findings must not seal Decision Proof.
v0_10_0_future_completion_release_reserv: v0.10.0 is reserved for a future M11 completion release and must not be treated as released.
not_authority_statement: This release proof linkage is evidence linkage only. It must not approve a release, accept risk, execute rollback, seal Decision Proof, close audit, grant waivers, change approval doctrine, change identity trust, change policy authority, change decision routing, or make final governance judgments.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS remains the decision sovereignty layer.
